place_eyes.title: Place all 12 eyes in the End Portal frame — activate the portal

obsidian_platform.title: Build an obsidian combat platform above or near the portal room (minimum 10x10)

anchor.title: Set a Respawn Anchor or bed respawn point near the stronghold

subtitle.text: Twelve eyes. Twelve civilizations. One door.

description: End Remastered accepts any 12 unique eyes — one per slot.
The twelve custom eyes cover: the nine civilizations' legacies
plus the Wither (anchor), the Guardian (anchor), and the Nether (anchor).
Black, Lost, Cold, Rogue, Cryptic, Magical, Corrupted, Cursed, Old (custom eyes)
Wither Eye, Guardian Eye, Nether Eye (anchor eyes — boss drops)
Place all twelve. The portal activates.
Build a platform in the stronghold room first.
Set a respawn point — the End does not have beds.
Dying in the End without a respawn anchor returns you to world spawn.
→ Activate the End Portal with all 12 eyes [check]
→ Build a combat platform near the portal [check]
→ Set respawn anchor or nearby respawn [check]
